programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep106: Shark Biology + Greenland Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Greenland Sharks in Canada’s Gulf of St Lawrence, explains shark biology and takes a Deeper Dive with a focus on Longtail Carpet Sharks and Basking Sharks.

programme.title: Blue World Ep713: Kittiwake Shipwreck in Grand Cayman + World’s Longest Submerged Cave
programme.desc: On Grand Cayman, Blue World explores the wreck of the Kittiwake, an artificial reef planted just for divers. Then the Blue World dive team travels to the Yucatan where they explore the world’s longest submerged cave.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter - Fish Out of Water: Dairy Farming vs Kayak Fishing
programme.desc: You can't milk a fish, but you can milk a cow! In this episode, Mike takes dairy farmer, Quintin Cook, fishing for his first time in a kayak. After an exciting day on the water, Quintin shows Mike the ropes of being a dairy farmer. Which dream job is more fun for them? Check out all the fun!

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep106: Australia
programme.desc: From the sand bottom perfection of Australia’s East Coast to the rugged and heaving waves of the West, this episode rides along with former professional surfer and all round legend Dean “Dingo” Morrison as he guides viewers through what surfing is like in his home country…lots of tubes and good times!

programme.title: Xplash Ep106
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today we’ll get soaked in Africa's great Nile River while kayak surfing; Maya Gabeira goes in search of the biggest wave ever surfed by a woman; and our first stop takes us windsurfing in Maui.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep106
programme.desc: Liquid Edge features untouched waves in West Papua, Indonesia, Kitesurfing World Championships in Fuertaventura, mind-blowing canyon leaps with the Deep Canyoning crew, kayaking in Vera Cruz, Mexico, plus profiles of pro surfers Justin Barca and Ezekial Lau, as well as waterman Kai Lenny.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure Ep208: The Billabong Clipper…In Search of the Ultimate Wave
programme.desc: Pilot Mike Castillo takes a one of a kind surf seeking aircraft, the Billabong Clipper, down the Baja coastline in search of ultimate waves…bringing with him professional surfers Shane Dorian, Andy Irons, Dave Rastovich and others.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep106: Shark Biology + Greenland Sharks

programme.title: Hot Water Ep120: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: The world’s best powerboat racers compete head-to-head in Dammam, Saudi Arabia, on the prestigious F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour where the toughest steely-nerved marine motorsport racers lock horns for the most prestigious title in powerboat racing.

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Business Casual
programme.desc: Business Casual follows the Burton Snowboards crew and the Manboys as they enjoy the best part of the season in the Whistler area while Rusty Ockenden learns to operate a camera. The ManBoys crew encourages anyone who wants to get into the backcountry to take a first aid avalanche course with your whole crew. Be safe, have fun, learn from your mistakes - and learn from theirs. Featuring Jody Wachniak, Mark Sollors, Noah Cohen, Mikey Rencz, Matt Belzile, and Beau Bishop. Directed and edited by Rusty Ockenden

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Devun Walsh
programme.desc: Devun Walsh aka the GOAT. If only you could put into words the impact Devun has had on snowboarding. From his signature style, timeless tricks, mentorship, films, companies, attitude and his overall vision for our culture… and of course his ability to seek out and find new zones and features that till this day are the gold standard of professional backcountry riding. Truly one of the greats. Thanks for coming on boss. Enjoy!

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: Throughout the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast design foiling catamarans. The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. Let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik - Orebic

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E09 - Gold, Sweat and Dragon's Blood
programme.desc: Tom and Kia explore a mysterious mine in Colorado.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E06 - All Eyes On Us
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer are back at it, catching fish for dinner and getting closer to being able to leave. But things get tense when a grizzly bear wanders too close to their campsite, putting both brothers in danger!

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E07 - Salmon Island
programme.desc: Now that most of the waterfowl have headed further south for migration, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer are putting their efforts into fishing to get the calories they need. They're heading back downriver after packing up camp, zeroing in on an area they think has several moose.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E08 - Log Jammed
programme.desc: While the brothers get closer to a part of the river packed with moose, they face a bunch of problems. They have to find a way around and carry their stuff over a huge pile of logs that could mess up their hunt, possibly pushing them into a part of the river they weren't ready for.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: After more than three weeks trekking through moose country, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer finally set up camp in a new spot and almost immediately come face-to-face with a massive bull.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: With the odds piling against them, the 80-mile river adventure is almost over, and brothers Chris and Casey Keefer have one final opportunity to find an Alaskan moose just a few miles from where they'll be picked up at the river junction.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three successful blind artists whose visual impairment has become the starting point for their visual explorations.

programme.title: Schmitke
programme.desc: What should have been a ordinary job in the Czech Ore Mountains, becomes a mysterious expedition for the aging engineer Julius Schmitke.

programme.title: Honey and Ashes
programme.desc: Naima, a doctor, Amina, a graduate, and Leila, a young student, are pursuing their individual routes to an independent life when their paths cross.

programme.title: Papa Gold
programme.desc: Denny lives in in the city, boozes and dances through the night, and sleeps with one girl after another.

programme.title: Motorcity
programme.desc: A compelling exploration of the complexities of American life, history, and society through the lens of the unique and fascinating sport drag racing.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
